Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: tables by form: base form [300039578], tables by form [300039928], tables (support furniture) [300039548], support furniture [300039337], furniture by form or function [300048628], furniture [300037680], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: side tables [300039999], tables by location or context: position [300165792], tables by location or context [300165791], tables (support furniture) [300039548], support furniture [300039337], furniture by form or function [300048628], furniture [300037680], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Tables supported by a fixed bracket (console) against a wall, or supported by a substructure consisting of two or more legs of console form. The term may be used for similar tables having other forms of supporting legs. May have marble tops and heavily carved substructures.
Mesas laterales con tapas sostenidas por una subestructura consistente en dos o más patas en forma de consola, algunas veces tienen tapas de mármol y subestructuras profusamente talladas.
Zijtafels waarvan het blad wordt gesteund door een samenstel van twee of meer poten in consolevorm; ze hebben soms een marmeren tafelblad en zwaar bewerkte draagconstructies.
桌面由兩條以上螺卷形桌腿支撐的邊桌，部份具有大理石桌面，桌子下半部具繁複雕飾。
Tavolini di servizio con parti superiori sostenute da una sottostruttura di due o più gambe, a volte con parti superiori in marmo e sottostrutture pesantemente intagliate.
Seitentisch mit einer Platte, die durch ein Untergestell bestehend aus zwei oder mehr konsolförmigen Beinen getragen wird; manchmal mit einer Marmorplatte und stark geschnitztem Untergestell.

Term_Source.Page: GLOS, Tables fixed to a wall, usu. having a marble top, supp. on shaped legs curving back to the wall...

Source.Source_ID: 2000011141/Fleming and Honour, Dictionary of the Decorative Arts (1977)
2000017731/Smith, Collection of Designs for Household Furniture (1970)
2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Term_Source.Page: GLOS, 18th-c table intended to be placed against a wall, w/its top supported on brackets or consoles.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: lo hsing t'o chiao cho an
luo xing tuo jiao zhuo an
luó xíng tuō jiǎo zhuō àn
